proposal1.heroHeadline: WRTR is losing $57,600 a year to slow proposal processes that should take 47 seconds.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Currently, WRTR spends 4 hours crafting a single proposal for their services. Now, generate it in 47 seconds with full brand alignment.
proposal1.problemsIntro: These are the losses WRTR can quantify and stop.

problems.title: Time Sink Proposals
problems.description: Each proposal takes 4 hours of a senior strategist’s time. With 15 proposals a month at $75/hour, that's $54,000 a year not billed to clients.

problems.title: Revenue Leakage
problems.description: Missed follow-ups cost WRTR 3 potential clients each quarter. At an average contract value of $12,000, this is $36,000 lost annually.

problems.title: Competitive Disadvantage
problems.description: Competitors respond faster. WRTR’s proposal process takes 2 days. Clients expect a next-day response, causing a 20% drop in conversion.

problems.title: Brand Inconsistency
problems.description: Manual proposals risk inconsistency. 25% of proposals require rework to align with WRTR's brand, wasting 30 hours a month.

problems.title: Scaling Bottleneck
problems.description: As WRTR grows, the current process can't scale. Each new strategist spends 20% of their time on proposals, limiting capacity for client work.

problems.title: Missed Insights
problems.description: No behavioral tracking on proposals means WRTR misses insights. This results in a 10% decrease in proposal effectiveness.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Here’s how our AI system replaces these losses with measurable gains.

solutions.title: Instant Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, WRTR dedicates 4 hours per proposal. Our AI generates a complete, branded proposal in 47 seconds, saving 59 hours monthly.

solutions.title: 24/7 AI Chatbot
solutions.description: WRTR misses timely follow-ups. Our chatbot engages prospects immediately, reducing response time by 100% and boosting conversions.

solutions.title: Behavioral Tracking
solutions.description: Without tracking, WRTR misses key insights. Our system tracks every interaction, improving proposal effectiveness by 15%.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Manual proposals risk inconsistency. Our AI ensures every proposal is brand-aligned, cutting rework time by 100%.

solutions.title: Scalable Solution
solutions.description: Current methods cap growth. Our system scales with WRTR, freeing 20% of strategist time for client work, enhancing capacity.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for WRTR's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for WRTR around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for WRTR.

proposal2.tag: Proposal for Cascade Health Systems // Confidential
proposal2.heroHeadline: Transform Cascade Health Systems: Unlock 35% More Patient Engagement with WRTR's Expertise.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: In just 90 days, we will enhance Cascade Health Systems' online presence to convert 3x more site visitors into patients.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Cascade Health Systems is experiencing significant revenue losses due to underperforming digital channels.

problems.title: High Bounce Rate
problems.description: A 65% bounce rate is costing Cascade Health Systems approximately $120,000 annually in missed opportunities. Each lost visitor represents $50 in potential revenue.

problems.title: Low Conversion Rate
problems.description: At a conversion rate of 1.2%, you're missing out on $200,000 in potential revenue each year. Increasing this by just 1% could generate $100,000 more annually.

problems.title: Inefficient Ad Spend
problems.description: Current ad strategies are wasting $75,000 annually. Optimizing targeting and messaging can recover much of this loss.

problems.title: Poor Mobile Experience
problems.description: With 70% of users accessing via mobile, a poor mobile experience is losing you $150,000 each year. Retaining these users is crucial.

problems.title: Inadequate SEO
problems.description: Ranking on the second page of search results is costing you $90,000 annually in organic traffic. An SEO overhaul can capture these lost opportunities.

problems.title: Slow Site Load Times
problems.description: Each second of delay in loading time equals a 7% reduction in conversions, costing around $50,000 annually.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our solutions directly address and resolve the quantified losses identified above.

solutions.title: Conversion Rate Optimization
solutions.description: This service tackles your low conversion rate. We will conduct A/B testing and user journey mapping to enhance conversion paths. Expect a 2% increase in conversion rates within 60 days.

solutions.title: Advanced SEO Services
solutions.description: Poor SEO rankings will be addressed through keyword optimization and technical SEO audits. We aim to boost organic traffic by 30% within 90 days.

solutions.title: Mobile Experience Enhancement
solutions.description: Our team will redesign mobile interfaces to improve user retention. Deliverables include a mobile-responsive site redesign for a 25% increase in mobile engagement.

solutions.title: Targeted Ad Campaigns
solutions.description: We will refine ad targeting to reduce wasted spend. This includes crafting precise messaging and audience segmentation, with an expected 20% improvement in ROI.

metrics.label: Increase in qualified inbound leads within 90 days.
Boost in organic traffic through improved SEO in 90 days.
Increase in mobile user engagement within 60 days.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: WRTR is your strategic partner with a proven track record in healthcare marketing.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Healthcare Success
whyUsCards.description: With over 10 healthcare clients, we have increased average conversion rates by 35%.

whyUsCards.title: Data-Driven Approach
whyUsCards.description: Our strategies are backed by data analytics, ensuring every decision is informed and impactful.

whyUsCards.title: Collaborative Partnership
whyUsCards.description: We work closely with your team to ensure alignment and success. Our partnership is based on transparency and communication.

whyUsCards.title: Comprehensive Reporting
whyUsCards.description: You receive detailed monthly reports showing progress and ROI, keeping you informed every step of the way.

socialProof.label: Experience in the marketing and advertising industry.
In the healthcare sector, ensuring industry-specific expertise.
Client retention rate, reflecting our commitment to long-term success.

proposal2.teamIntro: Our team consists of seasoned professionals with deep expertise in marketing and advertising.

team.name: Tom Simpson
team.bio: With over 15 years in the industry, Tom has led WRTR to become a leading agency in healthcare marketing. His strategic vision has driven results for numerous clients.

proposal2.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Discovery & Research
process.description: We conduct an in-depth analysis of your current digital presence and competitor landscape.

process.title: Strategy Development
process.description: Develop a tailored strategy to address identified gaps and opportunities.

process.title: Implementation
process.description: Execute the strategy with a focus on quick wins and sustainable growth.
bullets: SEO improvements and ad campaign launches.

process.title: Review & Optimize
process.description: Evaluate results and iterate on strategies for continuous improvement.

pricing.name: Foundation Tier
pricing.description: Ideal for companies seeking to address specific aspects of their digital presence.

pricing.name: Growth Tier
pricing.description: Recommended for businesses looking for comprehensive digital strategy improvement.

pricing.name: Enterprise Tier
pricing.description: For organizations seeking a complete digital transformation.

proposal2.ctaDescription: Let's discuss how we can help you achieve your goals. Schedule a call today to explore the possibilities.

lead.company_description:
We are hard-wired to drive predictable revenue for our clients by unlocking, automating, and augmenting their funnels, pipeline, and operations for a de-costed, de-risked path to maximum profitability at scale.
 
With over a decade of experience helping hundreds of businesses from start-ups to enterprises, spanning 4 continents and 20+ countries we know what it takes to unlock our client's growth potential. We know exactly what it takes to open doors for our clients by getting them in front of the right decision-makers, with the right message at the right time!


Our talent and team augmentation solutions are geared perfectly to complement the revenue growth that we unlock and bestow on our clients, ensuring a more seamless, profitable path as they scale. Augmentix by Team Rocket unlocks our clients and their internal teams from repetitive operational tasks, circumnavigating bottlenecks and overloads by plugging flexible, remote, global talent, experts in their fields.
